mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id AS userId, f.fund_code AS fundCode, f.fund_name AS fundName, f.create_time AS createTime, uf.hold_share AS holdShare, uf.hold_amount AS holdAmount, uf.cost_price AS costPrice, uf.buy_date AS buyDate, uf.today_buy_share AS todayBuyShare, uf.today_sell_share AS todaySellShare FROM fund f LEFT JOIN user_fund uf ON f.fund_code = uf.fund_code AND f.user_id = uf.user_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT f.id, f.user_id AS userId, f.fund_code AS fundCode, f.fund_name AS fundName, f.create_time AS createTime, uf.hold_share AS holdShare, uf.hold_amount AS holdAmount, uf.cost_price AS costPrice, uf.buy_date AS buyDate, uf.today_buy_share AS todayBuyShare, uf.today_sell_share AS todaySellShare FROM fund f LEFT JOIN user_fund uf ON f.fund_code = uf.fund_code AND f.user_id = uf.user_id WHERE f.fund_code = #{fundCode} AND f.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fund (user_id, fund_code, fund_name, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fundCode}, #{fundName}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM fund WHERE fund_code = #{fundCode} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fund WHERE fund_code = #{fundCode} AND user_id = #{userId}
